chapter_title.en: Two Characteristics Granted to Whoever Honors the Rights of God

text: 2-49 وفي خبر آخر قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: من سرته حسنته وساءته سيئته فهو مؤمن

en.dr-ali-peiravi: 2-49 And in another narration we read that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Whoever gets pleased with his good deeds and feels bad about his bad deeds is a believer.”
